name: Carboniferous
description: Coal swamps, towering lycopsid forests, and oxygen-rich terrestrial ecosystems.

visuals.notes: PALEOMAP raster source: Map64a ECarb Tournaisian_350.jpg. Higher O2 (~35%) warrants slightly brighter, denser atmosphere — reflected in ambientLight 0.55 and stronger glow. Lighting values are final/direct — no hidden multipliers.
